channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: What is California Proposition 33?
item.description: California voters this November will decide whether to expand rent control statewide by repealing a 1995 law. The Costa-Hawkins Rental Housing Act currently limits a local government's ability to cap rents on newer properties and single-family homes.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Comer slams Raskin as 'ultimate hypocrite' after Raskin stopped short of committing to certify a Trump win
item.description: House Oversight Chair James Comer slammed Rep. Jamie Raskin as "the ultimate hypocrite" and talking "a big game" after Raskin fell short of committing to certifying a Trump win.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: U.S. expands sanctions on Iran in response to its ballistic attack on Israel
item.description: The U.S. on Friday announced new sanctions on Iran’s energy sector in response to its October 1 attack on Israel, firing roughly 180 missiles into the country.
item.dc:creator: Fatima Hussein, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump swipes at Detroit during speech in Motor City
item.description: Former President Donald Trump on Thursday bashed the city of Detroit as a “mess” and called it a developing area during a speech in the Motor City.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Trump announces 'Operation Aurora' to target illegal immigrant gang members in Colorado
item.description: Former President Trump is expected to announce “Operation Aurora" during his rally in Colorado Friday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Senate candidates steer clear of debates
item.description: Senate candidates this cycle are largely steering clear of the debate stage, in some cases avoiding it altogether, marking a major change from past years as campaigns question the debates' importance. For years, it was common for top Senate races to feature multiple debates.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Obama urges Black men to show up for Harris as he campaigns in critical Pennsylvania
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Former President Barack Obama gave a blistering critique of his White House successor Donald Trump and urged Black men to show up for Kamala Harris as he opened a swing-state tour for the Democratic ticket.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden suggests Trump 'get a life' after false hurricane claims
item.description: Biden specially called out a claim that those impacted by the storm are only receiving $750 in government assistance.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Utah candidates for Mitt Romney's open US Senate seat debate approaches to climate change
item.description: OGDEN, Utah (AP) — The Republican and Democratic candidates vying for Mitt Romney’s open U.S. Senate seat sought to convince Utah voters on Thursday that they have the better blueprint to tackle climate change and protect the state's vast natural resources. Republican U.S. Rep.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: An inside look at Kern County election operations
item.description: With the general election weeks away 17 News is taking you behind the scenes to see how the Kern County Elections Division is preparing.
item.dc:creator: Cecilia Treviño, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump's complaints about '60 Minutes' put a spotlight on editing at the nation's top newsmagazine
item.description: Donald Trump skipped a “60 Minutes” interview this past week, but he's attacking CBS for how it handled its session with opponent Kamala Harris, calling it a “giant fake news scam” and suggesting the network was out to protect her.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Tallahassee sends city crews to aid Tampa Bay recovery efforts
item.description: As communities wait for daylight to come Thursday morning to see the damage that has been done and for emergency personnel to start rescue efforts, counties in north Florida are sending their crews to the Tampa Bay area to aid in recovery.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Pat Ryan 'incredibly frustrated' over lack of FEMA relief in Orange County
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The race for New York’s 18th Congressional District heated up on Wednesday evening as candidates Alison Esposito and Pat Ryan faced off in a live debate on PIX11 News.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, PIX 11

item.title: A federal judge will hear more evidence on whether to reopen voter registration in Georgia
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — At least for now, a federal judge won’t order the state of Georgia to reopen voter registration for November’s elections. U.S.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Ryan Hamilton discusses homelessness, the Animal Foundation, and F1
item.description: Ryan Hamilton, a Republican candidate for the Clark County Commission, appeared on 8 News Now's Daily Voting Guide to share his perspective on homelessness, animal welfare, and Formula One's impact on the local economy as the election nears.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Pat Ryan, Alison Esposito face off in NY-18 debate on PIX11
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Democratic U.S. Rep. Pat Ryan and Republican Alison Esposito, the two candidates running to represent New York's 18th Congressional District, faced off in a debate on PIX11 Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, NewsNation

item.title: Ethel Kennedy, widow of Robert F. Kennedy, hospitalized after suffering stroke
item.description: "She is comfortable, she is getting the best care possible, and she is surrounded by family," Former Rep. Joe Kennedy III posted on social media.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: Trump secretly sent Putin COVID-19 tests during pandemic shortage, a new book reports
item.description: Vice President Harris is criticizing Trump over the reported shipment, which is detailed in a new book by the journalist Bob Woodward. The president's campaign has denied the reporting.
item.dc:creator: Jason Breslow, MPR News

item.title: Major North Carolina newspaper knocks Trump over Helene response 'falsehoods'
item.description: A leading newspaper in North Carolina is blasting former President Donald Trump over what it calls his "falsehoods" about the government response to Hurricane Helene, which devastated large swaths of the state last week.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5

item.title: Trump's plan would add $4 trillion more to U.S. debt compared to Harris', analysis says
item.description: Neither former President Donald Trump nor Vice President Kamala Harris have plans to fix the national debt, risking "an eventual fiscal crisis," a budget nonprofit group found in its analysis.
item.dc:creator: Luke Garrett, MPR News

item.title: Walz says he'll 'own up' when he misspeaks as the Democratic ticket steps up media interviews
item.description: The “Fox News Sunday” interview reflected a broader media blitz by presidential nominee Kamala Harris and Walz as the Democrats seek to garner public attention in the final 30 days of the campaign.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News
